name: pickfix
description: Point, pick, fix — preview-driven development with AI

scripts.predev: lsof -ti :5678 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; rm -rf examples/demo/.next apps/web/.next 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev:proxy: until curl -s --noproxy '*' -o /dev/null http://localhost:5678 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.5; done; PF_TARGET_URL=http://localhost:5678 pnpm --filter @pickfix/proxy dev
scripts.dev:web: until curl -s --noproxy '*' -o /dev/null http://localhost:4000 2>/dev/null; do sleep 0.5; done; pnpm --filter @pickfix/web dev
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @pickfix/bridge test && pnpm --filter @pickfix/proxy test && pnpm --filter @pickfix/web test
